case_title: MONTOYA, BEATRIZ VS AGUILAR, LUIS A. JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, LUIS A. JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, BEATRIZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, LUIS A. JR. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,052.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY MONTOYA, BEATRIZ AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, LUIS A. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $750 PER MO BEG. ON 3/25/05 & ON 25TH OF EACH MO. UNTIL PAID IN FULL IF PAYMT MISSED ENTIRE BAL DUE IMMEDIATELY

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-27-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $4500. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
